rule-of-one-person.without_evidence: Addresses 'your project tracker', 'your client' - speaks to a specific PM/team lead
rule-of-one-person.with_evidence: Addresses 'your Monday standup', 'your team', 'your project' - speaks to a specific PM/team lead

rule-of-one-problem.without_evidence: Problem section focuses on one core issue: lack of visibility/coordination causing missed deliverables
rule-of-one-problem.with_evidence: Problem section focuses on one core issue: project fragmentation across too many tools

rule-of-one-action.without_evidence: Single CTA: 'Start Free Trial' - no competing actions
rule-of-one-action.with_evidence: Single CTA: 'Start my free trial' - no competing actions

framework-missing.without_evidence: No framework is explicitly stated or clearly identifiable; structure is loose Problem-Solution but not a recognized framework applied with discipline
framework-missing.with_evidence: Explicitly states PAS framework at top and follows it: Problem (fragmentation), Agitate (every tool makes it worse), Solution (one workspace)

banned-vocab.without_evidence: No banned words found in the output
banned-vocab.with_evidence: No banned words found in the output

banned-pattern-negative-parallelism.without_evidence: 'The cost is not abstract -- it is missed launches' uses the 'not X -- it is Y' construction, a variant of 'not just X but Y'
banned-pattern-negative-parallelism.with_evidence: No 'not just X but Y' pattern found

banned-pattern-vague-attribution.without_evidence: No vague attributions like 'many experts believe' remain
banned-pattern-vague-attribution.with_evidence: No vague attributions; uses specific numbers and named companies

banned-pattern-setup-pivot.without_evidence: No 'However... On the other hand' pattern present
banned-pattern-setup-pivot.with_evidence: No 'However... On the other hand' pattern present

banned-style-em-dash.without_evidence: Uses double dashes as em dash substitutes between words: 'Live dashboards -- See every project's', 'Automated workflows -- Assign tasks', 'Built-in client portal -- Give stakeholders', 'Start Free Trial -- No Credit Card Required'
banned-style-em-dash.with_evidence: No em dashes or em dash substitutes between words in the copy

banned-style-title-case.without_evidence: Headlines use sentence case: 'Ship Projects on Time. Every Time.' and 'One workspace. Zero guesswork.'
banned-style-title-case.with_evidence: Headlines use sentence case: 'Ship projects on time, every single time'

benefits-over-features.without_evidence: Features described as benefits: 'See every project's real status', 'Assign tasks, trigger handoffs', 'Give stakeholders a live window'
benefits-over-features.with_evidence: Features described as benefits: 'See who's working on what', 'Deadlines that actually mean something', 'Reports your CFO will actually read'

headline-too-long.without_evidence: 'Ship Projects on Time. Every Time.' is 7 words
headline-too-long.with_evidence: 'Ship projects on time, every single time' is 7 words

headline-no-action-verb.without_evidence: Starts with action verb 'Ship' with specific outcome 'on Time'
headline-no-action-verb.with_evidence: Starts with action verb 'Ship' with specific outcome 'on time'

cta-no-action-verb.without_evidence: 'Start Free Trial' begins with action verb 'Start' and specifies outcome
cta-no-action-verb.with_evidence: 'Start my free trial' begins with action verb 'Start' and specifies outcome

cta-missing-microcopy.without_evidence: Final CTA button includes 'No Credit Card Required' as microcopy
cta-missing-microcopy.with_evidence: 'No credit card needed. 2 min setup.' microcopy beside CTA

specificity-principle.without_evidence: '2,400+ teams at Stripe, Lattice, and Linear' - specific number and named companies
specificity-principle.with_evidence: '2,847 teams including Stripe, Linear, and Vercel' - specific number and named companies

social-proof-no-attribution.without_evidence: All testimonials have full name + role + company: 'Jamie Sullivan, Head of Ops at Reforge'
social-proof-no-attribution.with_evidence: All testimonials have full name + role + company: 'Jamie Sullivan, VP of Engineering, Koala Health'

social-proof-vague-quotes.without_evidence: Quotes include specifics: 'cut our delivery time by 35%', 'Replaced Asana, Notion, and three spreadsheets'
social-proof-vague-quotes.with_evidence: Quotes include specifics: 'cut our project delivery time by 34%', 'team of 42 was fully running projects by end of day one'

no-urgency-or-risk-reversal.without_evidence: Has 'No Credit Card Required' (risk reduction) but no urgency/scarcity element and no guarantee/risk reversal
no-urgency-or-risk-reversal.with_evidence: Has urgency ('Your next project is already behind schedule'), risk reversal ('Cancel anytime'), and '14-day free trial. Full features.'

clear-takeaway-first-line.without_evidence: First line 'Ship Projects on Time. Every Time.' is a clear value proposition
clear-takeaway-first-line.with_evidence: First line 'Ship projects on time, every single time' is a clear value proposition

sentence-variation.without_evidence: Sentences vary in length throughout - short punchy lines mixed with longer descriptive ones
sentence-variation.with_evidence: Sentences vary significantly in length - from short ('One place for all of it.') to longer complex sentences
